title: Civil Service Commission Appeals Process
description: Step-by-step procedural guide from the MA Civil Service Commission covering all stages of a G.L. c.31 appeal: pre-hearing conference, full evidentiary hearing, post-hearing proposed decisions, and the Commission's final order — including continuance rules, exhibit requirements, and judicial review in Superior Court under G.L. c.30A §14.
notes: KEY DEADLINES: pre-hearing conference within 60 days of appeal receipt; pre-hearing memo ≥ 1 week before; full hearing typically 45–90 days after pre-hearing; exhibits ≥ 2 weeks before full hearing; reconsideration within 10 days of decision; Superior Court appeal within 30 days of decision (reconsideration does NOT toll this).
